capabilities.description: Path, stream, byte, synchronous, and asynchronous workbook flows.
XLS, XLT, XLA, XLM, and XLW legacy extension classification.
capabilities.note: All legacy variants are detected and reported. Native output is intentionally limited to XLS until each variant has a proven writer contract.

capabilities.description: Worksheets, order, names, visibility, selected tab, and active sheet.
Chart, macro, dialog, and other legacy sheet kinds.
capabilities.note: Chart sheets project to chart-sheet parts. Macro, dialog, and unsupported sheet kinds remain explicit conversion findings.

capabilities.description: Numeric, text, Boolean, error, blank, date, and cached formula values.
Cell rich-text runs and phonetic information.
capabilities.note: Common rich text is editable; unsupported phonetic and formatting variants are preserved or blocked.

capabilities.description: BIFF8 formula tokens, shared formulas, arrays, names, and cached results.
capabilities.note: A broad tested token subset is native. Unsupported functions, token forms, and multi-cell array cases are diagnosed before output.

capabilities.description: Fonts, number formats, fills, borders, alignment, protection, and XF inheritance.
capabilities.note: Common BIFF8 style records are editable; non-representable Open XML styling blocks legacy output.

capabilities.description: Row and column geometry, hidden state, outlines, merges, panes, views, and selections.
Internal and external hyperlinks.
Classic cell comments and authors.
AutoFilter, sort state, and supported filter criteria.
capabilities.note: Supported BIFF8 filter forms are native; modern-only filters are preflight-blocked.

capabilities.description: Data-validation rules, prompts, and error messages.
capabilities.note: Supported rule and formula subsets are native.

capabilities.description: Classic conditional-formatting rules and differential formatting.
capabilities.note: Classic rules are native; modern extension rules are approximated or blocked.

capabilities.description: Workbook and worksheet defined names and supported external-sheet references.
Page setup, margins, breaks, print titles and areas, and headers and footers.
capabilities.note: Supported printer settings and header/footer text are native; unsupported relationships are blocked.

capabilities.description: Workbook, worksheet, range, sharing, and classic password-hash protection metadata.
Built-in and custom compound-file document properties.
capabilities.note: Supported scalar properties are native; unknown variants remain preservation-owned.

capabilities.description: Worksheet images, shapes, text boxes, groups, and controls.
capabilities.note: Supported legacy images project editably. Unsupported modern drawing content either blocks or is rendered into a palette-quantized cell raster; PreservationOnly can also retain the source carrier.

capabilities.description: Embedded charts and chart sheets.
capabilities.note: Chart-sheet structure and supported chart visuals project through the editable model. Unsupported modern chart output either blocks or is rendered into a palette-quantized cell raster.

capabilities.description: Modern sparklines and their rendered appearance.
capabilities.note: BIFF8 has no native sparkline model. Visual modes render the complete worksheet into a palette-quantized cell raster; strict modes block.

capabilities.description: Pivot tables, pivot caches, slicers, and timelines.
capabilities.note: Existing binary metadata is detected or preserved. Unsupported modern output either blocks or uses the omission-gated worksheet cell-raster fallback.

capabilities.description: VBA project storage and macro-sheet behavior.
capabilities.note: Exact carrier retention is safe for unchanged or explicitly preservation-aware XLS flows; editable cross-format parity is not claimed.

capabilities.description: OLE packages, ActiveX controls, and cached previews.
capabilities.note: Exact carrier retention is safe for unchanged or explicitly preservation-aware XLS flows; editable cross-format parity is not claimed.

capabilities.description: Legacy digital-signature streams and storages.
capabilities.note: Exact carrier retention is safe for unchanged or explicitly preservation-aware XLS flows; editable cross-format parity is not claimed.

capabilities.description: BIFF8 XOR, classic RC4, and RC4 CryptoAPI password-to-open encryption.
capabilities.note: Supported encrypted XLS input can be loaded with a password. Cross-generation conversion reports that password protection is removed and blocks by default; first-party encrypted XLS authoring remains incomplete.

capabilities.description: Unknown BIFF records, compound streams, and storages.
capabilities.note: Exact carrier retention is safe for unchanged or explicitly preservation-aware XLS flows; editable cross-format parity is not claimed.

capabilities.description: Hash-verified original source retained beside an editable projection or visual compatibility fallback.
capabilities.note: Embedding is explicit because original bytes may contain macros, hidden sheets, or embedded payloads. PreservationOnly enables it automatically; callers can recover the verified payload through TryGetCompatibilitySourcePayload.
